seoTitle: Swanston vs Table Cape — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swanston and Table Cape. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Swanston vs Table Cape: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swanston and Table Cape.
heading: Swanston vs Table Cape — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swanston, Tasmania and Table Cape, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Table Cape has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Swanston (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swanston or Table Cape safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swanston has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Table Cape scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swanston scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Table Cape scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swanston or Table Cape?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Table Cape has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
